column14: Before each game each person will choose 1 NBA player from either team. The player must be active for the game. You can only use a player once during the Finals.

The person with the least points from each game picks first the following game. Draft order proceeds in that fashion until the person with most points from the previous game picks last. Tie goes to the lower seed from previous game.
Leaders in each category are listed in bold.
The person with the most cumulative points throughout the Finals wins!

If the player you drafted plays less than 5 mins in the first half then you can switch to any other available player at half time. You void any points acquired by your original player and assume all of the points for your new player. The player must have played at least 5 mins in the previous game.
